summary: Comprehensive responsive testing completed for CRM Global Clean Home. Focus areas: OVERFLOW PREVENTION and SPINNER REMOVAL. All 11 pages tested at mobile (375px) and desktop (1280px) viewports - 100% pass rate. No horizontal overflow detected on any page. No visible animate-spin spinners found. Mobile-specific layouts (cards, list views) working correctly. Sidebar toggle, modals with max-h/overflow-y-auto all verified.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All responsive fixes verified. Key implementation details: (1) html/body have overflow-x:hidden in index.css, (2) App.js content div uses w-0 overflow-x-hidden, (3) All loading states use animate-pulse instead of animate-spin, (4) Planning uses hidden md:block for desktop calendar + md:hidden for mobile list view, (5) Leads/Invoices use hidden md:block for tables + md:hidden for cards, (6) All modals have max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto, (7) All text has truncate class for overflow prevention.

mobile_375px.leads: PASS - No overflow, mobile cards visible
mobile_375px.invoices: PASS - No overflow, mobile cards visible
mobile_375px.planning: PASS - No overflow, mobile list view visible

desktop_1280px.all_pages: PASS - No horizontal overflow on any page

spinner_removal.mobile_375px: PASS - 0 visible animate-spin elements on all pages
spinner_removal.desktop_1280px: PASS - 0 visible animate-spin elements on all pages

mobile_layouts.leads_mobile_cards: PASS - 15 cards visible (md:hidden div), truncate class applied
mobile_layouts.planning_mobile_list: PASS - Mobile list view (md:hidden) showing, desktop calendar hidden
mobile_layouts.sidebar_toggle: PASS - Hamburger opens sidebar as overlay, X button closes it

components_verified.App.js: Content div w-0 overflow-x-hidden, MobileHeader lg:hidden
components_verified.Sidebar.js: Mobile drawer -translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0, overlay, close button
components_verified.Dashboard.js: No spinner, grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4, overflow-hidden, truncate on values
components_verified.LeadsList.js: hidden md:block table + md:hidden mobile cards with truncate
components_verified.InvoicesList.js: hidden md:block table + md:hidden mobile cards
components_verified.PlanningCalendar.js: hidden md:block calendar grid + md:hidden list view, truncated team names
components_verified.Analytics.js: overflow-hidden on chart containers, animate-pulse for loading
components_verified.FinancialDashboard.js: overflow-hidden on charts, animate-pulse for loading, truncate on values
